images.name: Homepage Hero Portrait
images.prompt: Professional portrait of this Vietnamese male lawyer in his 40s wearing a premium tailored dark navy suit with a subtle gold tie clip, standing confidently with arms slightly crossed in a modern high-rise corner office. Floor-to-ceiling windows behind showing Ho Chi Minh City skyline at golden hour. Warm natural lighting from the left. Shallow depth of field, subject sharp, background softly blurred. Executive portrait photography style, shot at 85mm f/1.8. Color grading: warm tones, rich blacks, subtle gold highlights. The mood should convey authority, trustworthiness, and international sophistication.

images.name: Profile Page Hero - Desk Portrait
images.prompt: Professional environmental portrait of this Vietnamese male lawyer seated at a premium dark walnut executive desk in a luxury law office. He is reviewing a legal document with a thoughtful, focused expression. Warm desk lamp casting golden light. Behind him: floor-to-ceiling bookshelves with leather-bound legal volumes. He wears a charcoal suit with white shirt, no tie, top button undone for approachability. Shot at 50mm, medium depth of field. Color palette: warm wood tones, golden light, deep charcoal suit. Executive magazine editorial style.

images.name: Detail Accent Shot - Hands with Pen
images.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a lawyer's hands in premium dark suit cuffs with subtle gold cufflinks, holding a gold Mont Blanc pen while reviewing a legal document on a polished dark marble desk surface. Shallow depth of field, only the pen tip and nearby text in focus. Warm side lighting creating elegant shadows. Luxury feel, muted color palette: blacks, golds, warm whites. Shot at 100mm macro style.

images.name: Practice Area - Civil Disputes
images.prompt: Abstract minimalist representation of justice and civil law. Elegant intertwined gold metallic lines forming balanced scales of justice on a pure black background. Luxury brand aesthetic, clean geometric lines with subtle gold light reflections. No text. Think Tom Ford brand visual meets legal symbolism. Ultra-clean, high contrast, editorial quality.

images.name: Practice Area - Land & Real Estate
images.prompt: Aerial photograph of Ho Chi Minh City District 2 (Thu Duc City) real estate development at golden hour. Modern glass towers, riverside developments, and traditional neighborhoods visible. Warm golden sunlight, slight haze creating depth. Professional real estate photography from drone perspective. Color grading: warm amber tones, clean whites on buildings, deep shadows. No text or overlays.
images.style: Cinematic, aerial photography, warm golden tones

images.name: Practice Area - Family Law & Divorce
images.prompt: Elegant artistic still life of two gold wedding rings resting on the corner of a legal document on a white marble surface. Soft diffused warm lighting from above right. Extremely shallow depth of field, only one ring in sharp focus. Emotional yet restrained and professional. Color palette: white, gold, cream, with subtle warm shadows. Editorial luxury photography style, no people.

images.name: Practice Area - Corporate Law
images.prompt: Modern premium corporate boardroom in a Ho Chi Minh City high-rise. Long polished dark glass conference table, 12 black leather executive chairs, floor-to-ceiling windows showing city skyline. No people. Late afternoon golden light streaming in from the left. Ultra-clean, minimalist corporate interior. Color palette: blacks, dark grays, warm golds from sunlight, white ceiling. Architectural photography style, wide angle 24mm lens.
images.style: Architectural photography, corporate, warm golden light

images.name: Practice Area - Labor Disputes
images.prompt: Abstract minimalist composition: two silhouetted hands reaching toward each other to shake, formed entirely by thin gold metallic lines on a pure black background. The handshake is not yet complete - a small gap between the hands suggesting negotiation/mediation. Luxury brand aesthetic, geometric precision, subtle gold light reflections. Clean, professional, warm yet authoritative.
images.style: Minimal, luxury, gold line art on black

images.name: Practice Area - Criminal Defense
images.prompt: Dramatic low-angle photograph looking upward at grand courthouse columns and entrance. Classical architecture with Corinthian columns. Black and white photography with selective gold accent lighting on the column capitals and entrance frame. Imposing, powerful, authoritative atmosphere. Strong contrast, deep shadows, crisp highlights on stone texture. Architectural photography, 16mm wide angle perspective.
images.style: Dramatic, black and white with gold accents, architectural

images.name: Library / Publications Background
images.prompt: Premium law office private library interior. Dark mahogany wood bookshelves from floor to ceiling on both sides, filled with leather-bound legal volumes in burgundy, navy, and forest green. A rolling brass library ladder on the left. Warm amber ambient lighting from hidden ceiling spots and a green banker's desk lamp visible in background. No people. Rich, scholarly, luxurious atmosphere. Shot at 35mm, deep depth of field. Color palette: warm browns, deep reds, amber gold light, dark shadows.

images.name: HCMC Skyline Panoramic
images.prompt: Panoramic photograph of Ho Chi Minh City skyline at twilight/blue hour. Bitexco Financial Tower prominently visible. City lights reflecting golden on the Saigon River in foreground. Deep blue sky transitioning to warm orange at horizon. Premium cityscape photography, high dynamic range, crisp details on buildings. Color grading: deep blue shadows, warm golden city lights, slight teal in sky. Ultra-wide panoramic composition.

images.name: Gold Brushstroke Decorative Element
images.prompt: Single elegant gold brushstroke on a pure black background. Japanese/Chinese calligraphy-inspired sweeping horizontal stroke from left to right. Real metallic gold paint texture with visible brush hair marks. Slightly wider in the middle, tapering at both ends. Subtle gold particles scattered around the stroke. Luxury brand decorative element. High contrast, pure black background (#0A0A0A), rich gold (#C5A55A) stroke.

images.name: Dark Marble Texture Background
images.prompt: Seamless dark marble texture with subtle gold veining. Near-black marble (#1A1A1A base) with thin branching gold (#C5A55A) and warm brass (#B8924C) veins running diagonally. Polished surface with subtle reflections. Suitable as a website background texture - not too busy, mostly dark with occasional elegant gold lines. Tileable/seamless pattern. High resolution, photographic quality.

images.name: Conference / Speaking Event
images.prompt: Professional conference stage with a single podium and microphone. Warm spotlight illuminating the podium from above. Audience in soft bokeh blur in foreground/sides. Dark auditorium with warm amber accent lighting. Prestigious, authoritative atmosphere - think TED talk or international legal conference. No person at podium. Color palette: dark backgrounds, warm amber spotlight, subtle gold accents on podium. Event photography style.

images.name: District 1 HCMC Aerial
images.prompt: Aerial photograph of District 1, Ho Chi Minh City on a clear sunny day. Bitexco Tower, Notre Dame Cathedral, Central Post Office, and Nguyen Hue Walking Street all visible. Warm afternoon light, slight golden haze. Professional drone photography from approximately 300m altitude, looking slightly downward. Color grading: warm tones, vibrant but not oversaturated, clean blue sky. Establishing shot that conveys modern prosperity and tradition.

images.name: Default OG / Social Sharing Image
images.prompt: Create a professional social media card on black (#0A0A0A) background. Place this person's face in a circular crop with thin gold ring border on the left side. Right side: elegant gold serif text 'VO THIEN HIEN' large, below 'HENRY VO' smaller, below a thin gold horizontal line, then 'Managing Partner | Apolo Lawyers' in white small caps. Bottom right: subtle gold scales of justice icon. Clean, premium, luxury brand feel. Minimal and authoritative.

images.name: Practice Areas OG Image
images.prompt: Social media card on black (#0A0A0A) background. Top: thin gold horizontal line. Center: elegant gold scales of justice icon (minimalist line art, 120px). Below: 'PRACTICE AREAS' in white small caps with wide letter spacing. Below: thin gold line. Bottom: 'VO THIEN HIEN | ATTORNEY AT LAW' in small gold text. Clean, ultra-minimal, luxury law brand aesthetic.
images.style: Social card design, minimal luxury, gold on black

images.name: VH Monogram Favicon/App Icon
images.prompt: Minimalist monogram logo for a luxury law brand. The letters 'VH' intertwined in elegant thin gold (#C5A55A) lines on a pure black (#0A0A0A) square background. Think Chanel or Louis Vuitton monogram simplicity. The V and H share a vertical stroke. Ultra-clean, geometric, premium. No border, no extra decoration. Suitable for favicon use at very small sizes.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - Corporate Law Analysis
images.prompt: Top-down flat lay on a dark walnut desk: a leather-bound law book open to a page with highlighted text, a gold-nibbed fountain pen, corporate seal stamps, a stack of signed contracts with red wax seals, and a pair of reading glasses. Warm amber desk lamp light from top-left. Shallow depth of field, editorial still-life photography. Color palette: dark wood, cream paper, gold pen, warm amber light. No people, no text. Ultra-clean, luxury brand editorial style.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - Land & Property Disputes
images.prompt: Aerial photograph of a Vietnamese urban neighborhood meeting a modern high-rise development zone, clearly showing the boundary/contrast between traditional tile-roof houses and glass skyscrapers. Golden hour light, long shadows. Ho Chi Minh City style architecture. Professional drone photography, warm color grading. The composition emphasizes the tension between old and new — the core of land disputes.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - Foreign Investment in Vietnam
images.prompt: Close-up of two business professionals (one Asian, one Western) shaking hands across a conference table. Only their hands, suit cuffs, and the table surface are visible — no faces. On the table: printed documents, a Vietnam flag miniature, and an FDI certificate folder. Warm boardroom lighting, shallow depth of field. The handshake is in sharp focus. Color palette: navy suits, white shirts, gold cufflinks, warm oak table. Professional corporate photography.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - International Divorce
images.prompt: Minimalist still life: two passports (one Vietnamese, one generic foreign) placed side by side on a white marble surface, with a thin gold wedding band resting between them. A single white rose petal nearby. Soft diffused natural light from a window. Extremely shallow depth of field, only the ring in sharp focus. Emotional yet restrained, editorial luxury photography. Color palette: white marble, burgundy passport, gold ring, soft shadows.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - Labor Rights & Employment
images.prompt: Abstract composition: a construction hard hat (yellow) and a business briefcase (black leather) placed on opposite ends of a polished dark wood conference table, with a legal document and pen centered between them. The composition symbolizes employer-employee negotiation. Clean, editorial photography with warm side lighting. No people. Shallow depth of field focusing on the document. Professional, balanced, neutral tone.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - Criminal Defense & Rights
images.prompt: Dramatic close-up of a wooden judge's gavel resting on its sound block on a dark mahogany bench surface. A single beam of warm golden light illuminates the gavel from the left, casting a long shadow to the right. Dark, moody atmosphere with rich wood tones. The brass band on the gavel catches the light with a golden highlight. No text, no people. Cinematic legal photography, 85mm lens feel.

images.name: Consultation Room - Practice Area Pages
images.prompt: Premium private consultation room in a Vietnamese law office. Two leather armchairs facing each other across a small dark wood coffee table. A glass wall on one side shows a blurred Ho Chi Minh City skyline. On the table: two porcelain tea cups, a leather portfolio folder. Warm ambient lighting, a small desk lamp with green banker shade visible in background. Empty room, no people. The mood conveys confidential, premium, one-on-one consultation. Interior photography, 24mm wide angle.

images.name: Vietnamese Courtroom Interior
images.prompt: Interior of a Vietnamese courtroom (phòng xử án). The judge's elevated bench with the Vietnamese national emblem (gold star on red) mounted above. Wooden counsel tables in foreground, empty chairs. Warm natural light coming through tall windows on the left side. Clean, well-maintained government building interior. No people. The atmosphere conveys the weight of justice — formal, solemn, authoritative. Architectural interior photography, natural light.

images.name: Legal Document Signing Close-up
images.prompt: Cinematic overhead shot of hands signing a legal document on a dark desk. Multiple copies of the same contract stacked neatly, with gold paper clips. A notary stamp and red ink pad visible in the corner. The signing hand holds an expensive gold pen. Warm desk lamp lighting creating dramatic shadows. Only hands and forearms visible, wearing a premium dark suit. Color palette: dark wood, cream paper, gold accents, warm amber light. Legal editorial photography.

images.name: Attorney-Client Meeting
images.prompt: Professional photograph of this Vietnamese male lawyer in a navy suit sitting across from a client (seen from behind, blurred) in a premium office consultation setting. The lawyer is gesturing while explaining something, with documents and a laptop on the table. Floor-to-ceiling windows with Ho Chi Minh City skyline in soft bokeh background. Warm natural light. The mood conveys trust, expertise, and attentive counsel. Environmental portrait, medium shot, 50mm lens.

images.name: Legal Team Discussion
images.prompt: Professional photograph of this Vietnamese male lawyer standing at the head of a conference table, leading a discussion with 3 colleagues (backs to camera or in profile, slightly blurred). Whiteboards with legal diagrams in background. He is pointing at a document while explaining. Modern office with glass walls. Warm lighting. The mood conveys leadership, collaboration, and strategic thinking. Editorial corporate photography.

images.name: Thoughtful Lawyer Portrait - Perspectives
images.prompt: Intimate portrait of this Vietnamese male lawyer in a charcoal turtleneck (no suit), sitting in a modern leather chair in a private library/study. He is looking slightly off-camera with a thoughtful, reflective expression. A book is open in his lap. Warm reading lamp light, bookshelves out of focus behind. The mood is personal, intellectual, approachable — this is the thinker behind the lawyer. Portrait photography, 85mm f/1.8, shallow depth of field.

images.name: Legal Books Close-up Background
images.prompt: Extreme close-up of leather-bound Vietnamese legal code books lined up on a dark wood shelf. The spine titles are blurred but the texture of the leather and gold-embossed lettering is visible. Shallow depth of field, with only 2-3 books in focus and the rest blurring into a warm bokeh. Warm amber library lighting. Rich burgundy, navy, and forest green leather tones with gold text. Suitable as a website section background with text overlay. Bibliophile aesthetic.

images.name: Law Office Hallway - Premium Interior
images.prompt: Long perspective shot down a premium law office hallway. Dark wood paneling on walls, recessed warm lighting in the ceiling creating pools of light. At the end of the hallway, a large window shows the city skyline. Polished marble floor reflecting the lights. No people. The composition creates depth and conveys prestige, like walking into power. Architectural interior photography, 24mm lens, symmetrical composition. Color palette: dark wood, warm amber light, marble gray.

images.name: Gold Scales of Justice Icon
images.prompt: Minimalist 3D render of balanced scales of justice made of polished gold metal, floating against a pure black (#0A0A0A) background. The scales are perfectly balanced and catch dramatic side lighting from the left, creating elegant reflections and shadows. Ultra-clean, no extra elements. Luxury brand icon style. Think Apple product photography but for a legal symbol. High contrast, metallic gold (#C5A55A) on pure black.

images.name: Stylized HCMC Office Location Map
images.prompt: Elegant stylized map of Ho Chi Minh City District 1 area, rendered in a luxury brand aesthetic. Dark charcoal (#1A1A1A) background with gold (#C5A55A) line work for streets and landmarks. Key landmarks labeled in small gold text: Bitexco Tower, Notre Dame Cathedral, Ben Thanh Market. A gold pin marker at the office location (Trần Đình Xu street area). The Saigon River shown as a flowing gold line. Minimalist, cartographic art style. No satellite imagery — purely illustrated/stylized.

images.name: Practice Area - Commercial Disputes
images.prompt: Abstract minimalist representation of commercial arbitration and litigation. A large polished dark wood gavel and a gold balance scale placed on opposite sides of a long conference table, viewed from above at a dramatic angle. Between them, scattered legal documents and a contract with visible signature lines. Pure black background fading into the scene. Luxury brand aesthetic, high contrast, warm gold and dark wood tones. Clean geometric composition, editorial legal photography. No people, no text.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - Commercial Arbitration at VIAC
images.prompt: Interior of a modern arbitration hearing room. A curved dark wood tribunal bench for three arbitrators at the front, two counsel tables facing each other, microphones on each table, Vietnamese and international flags in the background. Clean, modern, well-lit room with warm wood paneling and glass partitions. No people. The atmosphere conveys formality, neutrality, and international standard. Architectural interior photography, wide angle 24mm lens. Color palette: warm wood, neutral gray walls, brass accents.

images.name: Article Thumbnail - Commercial Court Litigation
images.prompt: Close-up of a lawyer's hand placing a thick legal brief document onto a polished courtroom desk. The brief has a red binding spine and official stamps visible. Behind it, slightly out of focus, is a Vietnamese courtroom setting with wooden furniture and formal atmosphere. Warm side lighting creating dramatic shadows on the document. Only the hand, cuff of a dark navy suit, and the document are in sharp focus. Cinematic legal photography, 85mm lens. Color palette: dark wood, cream paper, navy suit, warm amber light.

images.name: Arbitration Hearing in Progress
images.prompt: Professional photograph of this Vietnamese male lawyer in a dark navy suit standing at a counsel table in a modern arbitration hearing room, presenting arguments. He is holding documents and gesturing toward a presentation screen. The arbitration panel (3 people, seen from behind in soft blur) sits at the tribunal bench. Clean, modern interior with warm lighting. The mood conveys authority, preparation, and professional advocacy. Environmental photography, medium shot.

images.name: HCMC Financial District - Commercial Context
images.prompt: Eye-level photograph of Ho Chi Minh City's financial district at dusk. Modern glass office towers (Bitexco Tower, Landmark 81 visible), busy Nguyen Hue boulevard with traffic light trails. The sky transitions from deep blue to warm orange at the horizon. Street-level perspective showing both the grandeur of the buildings and the energy of commerce. This represents the commercial heart of Vietnam. Professional cityscape photography, 35mm lens. Color grading: cool blue shadows, warm golden building lights, teal sky.

images.name: Commercial Disputes OG Image
images.prompt: Social media card on black (#0A0A0A) background. Top: thin gold horizontal line. Center-left: minimalist gold gavel icon (line art, 80px). Center-right: minimalist gold balance scale icon (line art, 80px). Between them: a thin vertical gold line. Below: 'COMMERCIAL DISPUTES' in white small caps with wide letter spacing. Below: 'Court Litigation & Arbitration' in smaller gold text. Bottom: thin gold line, then 'VÕ THIỆN HIỂN | ATTORNEY AT LAW' in tiny gold text. Ultra-minimal, luxury law brand aesthetic.

images.name: Logo Variation 1 — Bold Scales of Justice
images.prompt: Emblematic logo mark of the scales of justice for a premier Vietnamese law firm. Bold, weighty, sturdy proportions (khoẻ mạnh, cứng cáp) — a heavy central beam, broad balanced pans, solid base plinth. Strong geometric lines, symmetrical composition, confident silhouette. Rendered in solid antique gold with a subtle metallic sheen. NO letters, NO text, NO monogram. NO background — fully transparent PNG with alpha channel, the mark perfectly isolated, centered with generous margins. Flat vector-style, sharp crisp edges, suitable for scaling to tiny favicon or large header. Museum-quality heraldic gravitas.

images.name: Logo Variation 2 — Classical Pillar of Law
images.prompt: Emblematic logo mark: a single classical column (Corinthian or Doric order) symbolizing the pillar of law, for a top-tier Vietnamese law firm. Strong and sturdy — substantial shaft, solid capital, weighty base (khoẻ mạnh, cứng cáp). Clean architectural silhouette, balanced proportions, authoritative presence. Rendered in solid antique gold with minimal shading, flat vector aesthetic. NO letters, NO text, NO monogram. NO background — fully transparent PNG with alpha channel, the column isolated, centered with generous margins. Crisp edges, scales cleanly from favicon to banner.

images.name: Logo Variation 3 — Gavel and Open Book Crest
images.prompt: Heraldic logo mark combining a gavel resting atop an open law book, symbolizing jurisprudence and judgment, for a Vietnamese law firm. Bold silhouette, thick confident lines, symmetrical composition, strong and sturdy (khoẻ mạnh, cứng cáp) — chunky gavel head, substantial book thickness, solid base line. Rendered in solid antique gold, flat minimal vector style. NO letters, NO text, NO monogram. NO background — fully transparent PNG with alpha channel, the crest isolated, centered with generous margins. Crisp edges, professional and authoritative, reads at any size.

images.name: Logo Variation 4 — Laurel Wreath Around Scales
images.prompt: Emblematic logo mark: a laurel wreath encircling a small stylized scales of justice at its center, symbolizing victory of justice and legal achievement, for a Vietnamese law firm. Strong and stately (khoẻ mạnh, cứng cáp) — bold thick laurel leaves, substantial wreath silhouette, confident central scales. Perfectly symmetrical, heraldic gravitas. Rendered in solid antique gold, flat vector minimal style. NO letters, NO text, NO monogram. NO background — fully transparent PNG with alpha channel, the mark isolated, centered with generous margins. Crisp edges, museum-quality authority, scales from favicon to header.
